# Requirements — Diamond Fixture

A diamond pattern where one requirement fans out to multiple components that converge downstream.

| ID | Description | Priority | Rationale | Verification Method |
|----|-------------|----------|-----------|---------------------|
| REQ-001 | The system SHALL ingest telemetry | P1 | Core function | Test |
| REQ-002 | The system SHALL archive data | P2 | Compliance | Test |
| REQ-NF-001 | The system SHALL respond within 100 ms | P1 | Performance | Test |
